title: visual-evidence
description: Shared visual-evidence sidecar schema v0.1 (council SHIP 2026-07-24). CANONICAL HOME = EMCC.Library Codex §9; iron-soul-anvil VENDORS this file SHA-pinned and consumes the vendored copy in `pnpm anvil test --strict-assets`. Sidecar convention: `<asset>.visual-evidence.json` beside each asset. STDLIB-SAFE SUBSET by design (Library validator is a hand-rolled stdlib walker): only type / required / enum / properties / simple nested objects+arrays. NO $ref, allOf, oneOf, if-then, regex pattern on critical fields, or remote refs. Two DOCUMENTED RULES both validators hard-code in CODE (not JSON-Schema): (R1) base_asset_ref XOR fresh-gen — string form MUST equal the literal "fresh-gen"; object form MUST carry path+sha256; unflagged AND no base = FAIL. (R2) aesthetic_signoff.name MUST be non-empty (no name = no pass). CERT_CLASS is NOT a sidecar field (a settable sidecar cert_class would let a generator self-declare a pass before any gate runs — the narrated-cert failure the council fought): it is set POST-facto on the cert-handoff ONLY, never accepted as generator input; its locked data-side enum is {mechanical-pass-human-aesthetic, mechanical-fail} (no new values without a spec amendment both sides sign). 'certified' is BANNED for visuals.

asset_path.description: Repo-relative path to the asset. Maps to Codex §9 record key `path`.

sha256.description: sha256 of the asset bytes on disk. Same value _move_asset computes; §9 record stores it. Check 1 re-hashes disk and compares.

format.description: Asset container/codec, e.g. png, webp, svg. Check 2 matches declared vs on-disk and vs the style-bible resolution class.

dimensions.description: Pixel dimensions. Check 2 matches declared vs on-disk and vs the style-bible res class.

base_asset_ref.description: DERIVED frame -> object { ast_id (registered base-identity id or null until Library base-registry Phase 3), path, sha256 }; ROOT gen -> the literal string "fresh-gen". RULE R1 (hard-coded in both validators, NOT schema): string MUST == "fresh-gen"; object MUST have path+sha256; unflagged AND no base = FAIL (check 5 / §9 ingest). Maps to Codex §9 `derived_from`: fresh-gen -> [], object -> Library resolves ast_id into derived_from (backfills ast_id on base registration).

seed.description: Generation seed. §9 `recipe:` scalar. Recorded for provenance completeness, NOT byte-regenerability (Grok Imagine is hosted/nondeterministic/versioned).

style_bible_ref.description: The style bible this asset was authored against. 2-level nested, scalar leaves (§9 frontmatter-safe). §9 `recipe:` scalar pair.

style_tokens_declared.description: SIDECAR-ONLY (palette is a LIST -> cannot ride §9 frontmatter; the record points here by ref+sha). Check 4 asserts image color set is a subset of palette within the style-bible tolerance.

generator.description: Tool/pipeline that produced the asset, e.g. grok-imagine. §9 `recipe:` scalar.

aesthetic_signoff.description: SIDECAR-ONLY human record (nested -> cannot ride §9 frontmatter). §9 asserts it EXISTS + is well-formed + name non-empty (RULE R2) — it does NOT re-validate aesthetics (a record, not a cert). No name / no conditions = no pass.
